    • {{/Block}} {{Block "main"}} {{$int64Zero := Int64 0}}
    {{`清理存储卷`|$.T}} {{"删除选中"|$.T}} {{`新建存储卷`|$.T}}

    {{"存储卷列表"|$.T}}

    {{- range $k, $v := $.Stored.listData.Volumes -}} {{- end -}}
    		{{`名称`|$.T}} {{`作用域`|$.T}} {{`驱动`|$.T}} {{`挂载路径`|$.T}} {{`占用空间`|$.T}} {{`Labels`|$.T}} {{`创建时间`|$.T}} {{`操作`|$.T}}
    		{{$v.Name}} {{$v.Scope}} {{$v.Driver}}
    {{$v.Mountpoint}}
    		 {{if $v.UsageData}} {{if ge $v.UsageData.RefCount $int64Zero}} {{`引用容器数`|$.T}}: {{$v.UsageData.RefCount}}
    {{end}} {{if ge $v.UsageData.Size $int64Zero}} {{`占用空间`|$.T}}: {{FormatBytes $v.UsageData.Size 2 true}}{{end}} {{else}} N/A {{end}}     		{{range $kk,$vv:=$v.Labels}} {{$kk}}: {{$vv}}
    {{end}}     		{{$v.CreatedAt}}
    {{$.Stored.pagination.Render}}
    {{/Block}} {{Block "footer"}} {{/Block}}
